holdings.infoBox: FYX is an equity ETF with a total of 525 individual holdings. The top holdings are MaxLinear stock at 0.77%, Applied Optoelectronics at 0.56%, T1 Energy at 0.53%, Liquidia at 0.52%, and Garrett Motion at 0.51%.

overview.description: The First Trust Small Cap Core Alphadex Fund (FYX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq AlphaDEX Small Cap Core index. The fund tracks an index of small-cap stocks selected based on quantitatively driven growth and value factors. FYX was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Nasdaq AlphaDEX Small Cap Core Index
